name: claude-diff-review
description: Native, Monaco-powered diff review window. Browse changes since the merge-base with your base branch (or last commit / uncommitted), leave inline + file-level + overall comments, and have the agent address each item. Originally built for Claude Code; works in Codex CLI too.

interface.shortDescription: Native diff review window with inline comments
interface.longDescription: Adds a /diff-review slash command that opens a native, Monaco-powered diff window. Defaults to a PR-style review of all changes since the merge-base with the auto-detected base branch, with last-commit / uncommitted / all-files modes also available. Comments are written to a temp file the agent then reads back, addressing each item.
